title: Examine and assess trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Examine and assess trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for tree assessment

pcs.text: Identify scope of survey according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify scope of survey according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify scope of survey according to client brief.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Locate tree and document tree position according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate tree and document tree position according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate tree and document tree position according to client brief.

pcs.text: Identify and record tree species and determine implications on brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record tree species and determine implications on brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record tree species and determine implications on brief.

pcs.text: Assess and consider tree health that impacts on brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and consider tree health that impacts on brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and consider tree health that impacts on brief.

pcs.text: Estimate age of tree, tree parts and defects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate age of tree, tree parts and defects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate age of tree, tree parts and defects.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for tree assessment

elements.title: Acquire data for valuation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and record tree dimensions according to client brief.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and assess tree for indicators of habitat and ecological significance.

pcs.text: Investigate and assess tree for historical and cultural significance

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and assess tree for historical and cultural significance.

pcs.text: Investigate statutory controls on tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate statutory controls on tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate statutory controls on tree.

pcs.text: Record outcomes of investigation of tree significance and restrictions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record outcomes of investigation of tree significance and restrictions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record outcomes of investigation of tree significance and restrictions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Acquire data for valuation

pcs.text: Select and compare amenity tree valuation methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and compare amenity tree valuation methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and compare amenity tree valuation methods.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and collate unit values and data required for selected tree valuation methods.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and record amenity value of individual trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and record amenity value of individual trees.

pcs.text: Compare results and account for different values for selected methods

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare results and account for different values for selected methods.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider and communicate value of trees captured by amenity valuation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine target of concern and occupation rate.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine tree components of concern and their likelihood of failure.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine likely consequence of impact of target and tree components.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and document determinations and level of risk according to client brief.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommend follow-up inspection type and timeframe.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider risk against value of tree.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce a tree risk assessment report.
